# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment that pulls our application image from Docker Hub. Use the latest tag so we always get the newest version automatically. This is for our development environment where we want continuous updates without manual intervention.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-app-deployment
  labels:
    app: my-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-app-container
        image: myusername/my-app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        env:
        - name: ENVIRONMENT
          value: "development"
        resources:
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
      imagePullSecrets:
      - name: regcred
      securityContext:
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 3000
        fsGroup: 2000
